creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I get this during the "make install": 
===>  Checking if sysutils/pkgsearch already installed 
[100%] Built target pkgsearch 
Linking CXX executable CMakeFiles/CMakeRelink.dir/pkgsearch 
Install the project... 
-- Install configuration: "" 
-- Installing /usr/local/sbin/pkgsearch 
CMake Error: Error in cmake code at 
/var/ports/usr/ports/NEW/pkgsearch/work/pkgsearch-1.0-build/cmake_install.cmake:31: 
FILE INSTALL cannot find file "/var/ports/usr/ports/NEW/pkgsearch/work/pkgsearch-1.0/man/pkgsearch.1.gz" to install. 
Current CMake stack:  
[1]     /var/ports/usr/ports/NEW/pkgsearch/work/pkgsearch-1.0-build/cmake_install.cmake
